0:
Chora-Zoi is excitedly drafting up the next improvements to her tools.
※Changing classes or jobs will prevent progress during this quest.

Chora-Zoi is excitedly drafting up the next improvements to her tools.
※Changing classes or jobs will prevent progress during this quest.

1:
Chora-Zoi is eager to greet you, and takes a moment in your company to reflect upon her personal growth. Though the creation of her own tools has given her more confidence in her craft, the young smith is well aware that her labors with you and Grenoldt are far from complete. As if on cue, Grenoldt claims that he is ready to impart unto Chora-Zoi his secret techniques for the next steps of the tool enhancement process, and the two prepare once more to craft a tool that will breathe life into Norvrandt's trades. Such a monumental task cannot begin without the necessary trade goods, however, and you steel yourself in preparation for the slew of components that must be procured.

※Please note that you may not proceed with a class or job that is different from when you accepted the quest.

54:
In order to receive the quest “A Tool without Compare,” you must have
<SheetEn(Item,3,IntegerParameter(1),1,1)/> equipped, in your Armoury Chest, or in your inventory.

125:
Hee hee, perfect! Why, I think it shines even brighter in your hands, <Split(<Highlight>ObjectParameter(1)</Highlight>, ,1)/>.
Thank you for entrusting me with your tools once again. It's been an honor!
